headline: João Gomes
body: 🚨🇧🇷 João Gomes’ move to Atlético Madrid has been off since mid June, not developing since Atléti focused on Hjulmand. More clubs expected to join the race soon to get the Wolves midfielder. 🎥 piped.video/7mkObZHEiUQ
raw_text:
🚨🇧🇷 João Gomes’ move to Atlético Madrid has been off since mid June, not developing since Atléti focused on Hjulmand.

More clubs expected to join the race soon to get the Wolves midfielder.

🎥 piped.video/7mkObZHEiUQ
